Placed adjacent to conseguir, necesitar, dar, and near the cocinar y comer row; desayunar fits food-related daily actions and uses a preferred replaceable cell.
Placed in a replaceable cell close to comer, cocinar, and drink/taste actions above; cenar belongs with eating-related actions.
Placed in a replaceable cell near pensar/leer/escribir as a general task/action verb; among remaining spaces this best preserves open semantic organization without disturbing existing clusters.
Placed in a replaceable cell near enseñar/entender and adjacent to action vocabulary; juntar is a general manipulatory action and fits among broader action words in the lower rows.
Placed in the last replaceable cell beside sentir, celebrar, disfrutar, abrazar, besar, and pelear; pegar is socially/action-related and fits this interpersonal actions area.
